title: eritrichium canum
intro: Eritrichium canum, also known as woolly beardtongue or hairy beardtongue, is a perennial herb that belongs to the borage family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Eritrichium canum include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as supporting the immune system and promoting wound healing. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
